title: IBM MQ Queue
description: An IBM MQ queue is a named object that stores messages for asynchronous consumption. Queues can be local, alias, remote, model, or cluster types, each serving different messaging patterns.

maximumDepth.description: Maximum number of messages that can be stored on the queue

maximumMessageLength.description: Maximum message length in bytes for messages on this queue

inhibitPut.description: Whether put operations are inhibited on this queue

inhibitGet.description: Whether get operations are inhibited on this queue

defaultPersistence.description: Default persistence for messages put on this queue

defaultPriority.description: Default priority for messages put on this queue

backoutThreshold.description: Number of times a message can be backed out before being moved

backoutRequeueQueue.description: Queue to which messages are moved after exceeding the backout threshold

isTransmissionQueue.description: Whether this queue is used as a transmission queue for remote messaging

triggerControl.description: Whether triggering is enabled for this queue

triggerType.description: Type of triggering configured for this queue

shareability.description: Whether the queue can be opened by multiple applications simultaneously

currentDepth.description: Current number of messages on the queue

openInputCount.description: Number of handles currently open for input (get)

openOutputCount.description: Number of handles currently open for output (put)

lastPut.description: Timestamp of the last message put on the queue

lastGet.description: Timestamp of the last message retrieved from the queue

baseQueueName.description: Name of the base queue or topic that this alias resolves to

baseType.description: Whether the alias resolves to a queue or topic

RemoteProperties.description: Properties specific to remote queue definitions

remoteQueueName.description: Name of the queue on the remote queue manager

remoteQueueManager.description: Name of the remote queue manager

transmissionQueue.description: Name of the transmission queue to use

clusterName.description: Name of the cluster this queue belongs to

clusterNamelist.description: Name of the namelist of clusters this queue belongs to
